headline: Three up, one down, two new in top ten.
standfirst: Position Tracking project for cmsprime.com on the UAE Google database (English desktop). Across the 39-day engagement window, three keywords improved their positions, one declined, and two new keywords broke into the top 10. Visibility climbed +6.44%, average position improved by 17.42 places.

compare_hero.title: Average position across 31 tracked keywords
compare_hero.subtitle: Lower is better. The whole set climbed by 17 places.
compare_hero.caption: Average position across the tracked keyword set climbed from 105 to 88 — a 17-place improvement over six weeks. Average position falling is how Semrush expresses rank improvement (rank 1 is the top, rank 100 is the bottom; smaller number is better). The headline metric of the engagement, captured in a single number.

deliverables.title: Position movement across the bands
deliverables.subtitle: New keywords entering and exiting each ranking band during the period

rows.why: One new keyword broke into the top 3 over the period. Zero lost from top 3 — the brand term stayed locked at #1 throughout.
Three keywords broke into the top 10 (2 net new after accounting for 2 that dropped out). pamm forex trading and cms careers are the standout new top-10 entries.
Four keywords joined the top 20 this period. Two declined out, leaving net +2 in the band.
Four keywords joined the top 100 — keywords that previously had no ranking at all. Zero keywords dropped out of top 100.
pamm forex trading jumped 13 places, cms careers jumped 25 places, pamm account jumped 17 places. Combined visibility gain of +4.71%.
metatrader4 platform dropped this period (visibility loss -2.42%). This is the one position to recover — and the FAQ schema deployed on /metatrader-4/ on June 4 targets exactly this term.

cannibalization.title: Cannibalization health

cannibalization.note: Down 5 points this period. Hreflang deployment June 1 is expected to drop this further by July — multilingual cannibalisation between EN, AR, FA versions was a major contributor.

prose.title: What thirty-one keywords say.
paragraphs: The Position Tracking project tracks 31 keywords the engagement is specifically targeting. Across the 39-day window (Apr 26 - Jun 4), three of them improved their positions — pamm forex trading climbed 13 places, cms careers climbed 25, pamm account climbed 17. Combined those three moved visibility +4.71%.

One keyword declined: metatrader4 platform (-2.42% visibility). The FAQ schema deployed on /metatrader-4/ on June 4 specifically targets this term — the page now has 7 commercial-intent Q&As eligible for FAQ rich-results. Recovery expected on the July 1 reading once Google reindexes.

Average position across the entire 31-keyword set climbed by 17.42 places. That's a single-number summary of what the engagement bought. Two new keywords broke into the top 10 (pamm forex trading and cms careers). The brand term cms prime held #1 throughout. Net improvement +2.29% visibility over a six-week window during which the foundation work landed.

pull_quote.text: Average position climbed 17 places across 31 keywords. Three keywords improved for every one that declined.
